compiled_state.title: [ticket-platform-matrix.yml]: invalid strategy.continue-on-error key -> workflow startup_failure, no Ticket tests check contexts produced
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
### 2. Incident Overview

* **Scenario Type:** User-Flagged Behavior

#### Expected Behavior

`.github/workflows/ticket-platform-matrix.yml` should parse successfully and emit three check contexts on each PR to main: `Ticket tests (linux-bash4)`, `Ticket tests (macos-bash3)`, `Ticket tests (alpine-busybox)`. These are listed in `.github/required-checks.txt` and configured as required by the branch protection ruleset (provisioned by `plugins/dso/scripts/onboarding/provision-ruleset.sh`).

#### Actual Behavior

Every run of this workflow since at least 2026-04-24 has terminated as a startup_failure: `conclusion=failure`, `status=completed`, `total_count=0` jobs, `run_started_at == updated_at` (0-second duration). No `Ticket tests (...)` check runs are registered against any commit, so the branch-protection ruleset reports them as "Expected" indefinitely on PRs. Confirmed via:

- `gh api repos/navapbc/digital-service-orchestra/actions/runs/25026721430` → `conclusion=failure, run_started_at=2026-04-28T00:18:28Z, updated_at=2026-04-28T00:18:28Z`
- `gh api .../runs/25026721430/jobs` → `{"total_count":0,"jobs":[]}`
- `gh run list --workflow=ticket-platform-matrix.yml --limit 20` → all 20 most recent runs `conclusion=failure`, none with jobs

User observed this on PR #9 (https://github.com/navapbc/digital-service-orchestra/pull/9) where the three Ticket tests checks display as "Expected" in the PR UI.

### 1. Technical Environment

- Repo: navapbc/digital-service-orchestra
- Workflow file: `.github/workflows/ticket-platform-matrix.yml`
- Affected PR: #9 (`test/ci-enforcement-smoke-1777335496`)
- Workflow ID: 265534203

### 3. Action History

1. Inspected PR #9 checks via `gh pr checks 9` — only 7 checks reported, none named `Ticket tests`.
2. Inspected `.github/required-checks.txt` — confirms three `Ticket tests (...)` contexts are required.
3. Queried check-runs API for PR head commit `8e816b5` — no `Ticket tests` check runs present.
4. Queried workflow runs — all recent runs are 0-second startup failures across both `main` pushes and the PR branch.
5. Read workflow YAML on the PR branch — identified two schema issues (see Logs).

### 4. Chronological Rationalization

The startup_failure pattern (0 duration, 0 jobs, conclusion=failure) is GitHub Actions' signature for a workflow file that fails YAML/schema validation at parse time. Two candidates in the file:

- `strategy.continue-on-error: true` — `continue-on-error` is a job-level / step-level key per the GitHub Actions schema, not a strategy-level key.
- `container: ${{ matrix.container || '' }}` — when `matrix.container` is null (linux-bash4, macos-bash3 entries), the expression evaluates to an empty string, which is invalid for the `container:` key.

The `continue-on-error` placement is the more likely root cause because schema-key violations reject the workflow at parse time before expression evaluation runs.

### 5. Skills and Workflows

- `plugins/dso/scripts/onboarding/provision-ruleset.sh` — provisions the ruleset that requires these contexts.
- `plugins/dso/scripts/onboarding/validate-required-checks.sh` — validates `.github/required-checks.txt` alignment with workflow `name:` fields, but does not validate workflow YAML schema.
- No CI step currently runs `actionlint` or equivalent workflow-YAML linting, so this regression landed without detection.

### 6. Logs

```
$ gh api repos/navapbc/digital-service-orchestra/actions/runs/25026721430 --jq '{conclusion,run_started_at,updated_at}'
{"conclusion":"failure","run_started_at":"2026-04-28T00:18:28Z","updated_at":"2026-04-28T00:18:28Z"}

$ gh api repos/navapbc/digital-service-orchestra/actions/runs/25026721430/jobs
{"total_count":0,"jobs":[]}
```

Workflow excerpt (PR branch, identical on main):
```yaml
strategy:
  fail-fast: false
  continue-on-error: true   # invalid under strategy
  matrix:
    include:
      - name: linux-bash4
        os: ubuntu-latest
        container: null
      ...

container: ${{ matrix.container || '' }}   # empty-string fallback invalid
```

#### Suggested Fix Scope

1. Move `continue-on-error: true` out of `strategy:` (to job-level or remove).
2. Replace `container: ${{ matrix.container || '' }}` — either drop `|| ''` or split into two jobs.
3. Add an `actionlint` step to `ci.yml` so future workflow-schema regressions fail CI instead of silently producing 0-second startup failures.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC) — severity=1 (CI required check broken, blocks PR merges), complexity=0 (single workflow file + small ci.yml addition), environment=1 (CI), intermittent=0 (deterministic, every run startup_failure). Not compound — single root cause (invalid GH Actions schema in ticket-platform-matrix.yml).
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed. Gate 1b: skipped (decisive Gate 1a).
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Step 2 (BASIC investigation): empirically confirmed via actionlint — line 35:7 'unexpected key continue-on-error for strategy section. expected one of fail-fast, matrix, max-parallel'. container: ${{ matrix.container || '' }} is NOT flagged (disproved as a contributing cause). Discovery file: /tmp/fix-bug-discovery-9cb3-6ef0.json. Step 3 (hypothesis test): actionlint output is the empirical test. Step 4 (fix approval): user pre-approved scope (workflow fix + actionlint CI step) in originating session.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Committed cb26d9afd7 on branch fix/9cb3-6ef0-workflow-schema. PR opened: https://github.com/navapbc/digital-service-orchestra/pull/10. Awaiting CI to confirm Actionlint + 3 Ticket tests check contexts now report on the PR.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: PR #10 CI confirms primary fix landed: workflow now parses, all 3 Ticket tests check contexts now report on PRs (was 0 before), Actionlint job passes. Two pre-existing platform-compat bugs surfaced (hidden under startup_failure for 5+ days) and filed separately: 4fd5-b952 (macos-bash3 — 15/17 fail, likely bash-4 idioms in ticket-lib-api.sh) and f3e9-c70f (alpine-busybox — bash not on PATH or ash overrides shebang). PR awaiting merge approval.
comments.author: Test
